title: Too Many Hats
description: 啊！所有生物都有一... 顶帽子？All the mobs are wearing hats!
body:
![WARNING: This resource pack requires EMF or Optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f8284450e2eba4eff675f5f876ed01418e6b5e2.png)

# About
Too Many Hats is a resource pack which adds 22 new hats to Minecraft. These hats are randomly worn by certain mobs. Not only is it fun to see all the different hats, but it's also a great way to add variety to Minecraft's enemies!

## Supported Mobs:
```
 1  Creeper             2  Drowned             3  Enderman            
 4  Evoker              5  Husk                6  Illusioner
 7  Pillager            8  Skeleton            9  Vindicator         
10  Wither Skeleton    11  Zombie
```

## Hats:
```
- Antlers              - Arrow
- Baseball Cap         - Blossom
- Blue Glasses         - Bunny Ears
- Cat Ears             - Classic Boater
- Crown                - Fancy Boater
- Screws               - Green Visor
- Halo                 - Headphones
- Steel Helmet         - Horns
- Mortarboard          - Red Glasses
- Sun Glasses          - Mushroom Cap
- Top Hat              - Toque
```

![A second 3D render depicting the new mob hats.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63089b975e627a7ea34743d92e2c33cdee105e72_0.webp)
